text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 38 

LEUKLYMPH_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Leukemias and Lymphomas End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for leukemias and lymphomas 
as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: LEUKLYMPH_MEDICARE 

LONG NAME: LEUKLYMPH_MEDICARE 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1
